title: ranunculus angustatus
intro: Ranunculus angustatus, also known as narrow-leaved buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the genus Ranunculus, native to Europe and Asia. The plant contains alkaloids and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus angustatus include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve circulation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus angustatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
